news.headline: SNB to cut policy rate to 0.25% or lower by end-2025, say 15 of 28 economists; 13 say 0.50% or higher - Poll.
SNB to cut policy rate by 25 bps in December to 0.75%, say 27 of 31 economists; four say 50 bps - Poll
Matador Network Travel Awards announce 10 winners, half chosen by in-house experts.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 9, 2024, the Matador Network Travel Awards for 2024 revealed ten winners selected by the prominent travel publisher. Among these, five honorees were nominated and selected by Matador's own group of global-travel specialists using a point-based rating system.

news.headline: Bismarck Lepe appointed CEO of MiSalud Health, offering same-day bilingual telehealth in U.S. and Mexico.
news.summary: San Francisco-based MiSalud Health has named Bismarck Lepe as its new CEO. The company offers same-day bilingual telehealth services in the United States and Mexico.

news.headline: President Trump states he won't fire Fed Chair Powell. Plans include reducing immigration, imposing tariffs and more.
news.summary: The incoming president announced his decision to not replace the Federal Reserve chair. However, he plans to reduce immigration and implement tariffs among other measures.

news.headline: Apollo Art Auctions to feature Fine Islamic, Indian & Chinese art highlights, including 7th-8th century Sodgian silver elephant incense burner and 14th-century pottery tile wall panel. Sale on Dec. 14 in London.
news.summary: An upcoming auction in London on December 14, 2024 by Apollo Art Auctions will showcase significant Islamic artifacts. Notable items include a Sodgian silver elephant incense burner from the 7th-8th century and a molded pottery tile wall panel from the early 14th century featuring a striking turquoise and cobalt blue color scheme. These artifacts hold historical and artistic value, providing a glimpse into Islamic craftsmanship from different periods.

news.headline: Don't miss Binance CEO discussing Trump, crypto regulation on Bloomberg.
Novolex Holdings set to acquire Pactiv Evergreen, a rival in the packaging industry. For more details, check Bloomberg.
First patient enrolled in Phase 2 HARMONIC™ trial of LP-300 in never-smoker NSCLC patients in Taiwan by Lantern Pharma.
news.summary: In Dallas, Lantern Pharma Inc. revealed that the inaugural patient has been enrolled and received treatment in Taiwan for its Phase 2 HARMONIC™ clinical trial focusing on LP-300. This trial targets never-smoker patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have advanced post-tyrosine kinase inhibitor (TKI) treatment. Lantern Pharma is a leading artificial intelligence (AI) firm utilizing RADR® AI platform for tailored cancer therapies. The trial's progression marks a significant milestone for the company listed as NASDAQ: LTRN.

news.headline: Satellogic secures $10 million in private placement from single investor.
news.summary: Satellogic, based in New York, has announced a recent private placement investment of $10 million from a single institutional investor.

news.headline: Terra Balcanica uncovers silver and antimony potential at Bosnian Viogor-Zanik Project with Phase II drilling results soon.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 9, 2024, Terra Balcanica Resources Corp. ("Terra" or the "Company") is emphasizing the polymetallic prospects of its 168 km2 Viogor-Zanik project located in eastern Bosnia as they await the outcomes of Phase II drilling activities. The Company's stock is traded as CSE:TERA and FRA:UB10.

news.headline: Medical adhesives vital in healthcare for fast healing, minimal scarring. Market growing at 18-22% CAGR for single-use products.
news.summary: The medical adhesives market is witnessing significant growth due to the increasing demand for reliable adhesives in various medical procedures. This growth is fueled by the expansion of the single-use medical products market, which is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18% to 22% in the coming years. Acrylic-based adhesives are dominating the market due to their versatility and superior bonding properties, with hot melt adhesives gaining traction for their strong adhesion properties. The market is segmented based on resin type, technology, application, and region, with acrylic adhesives and hot melt technology projected to drive market growth in the future. The medical adhesives market is expected to follow a similar growth trajectory to that of the single-use disposable medical products market, with increasing adoption of single-use devices and ongoing innovations in adhesive formulations contributing to market expansion.

news.headline: iQIYI (NASDAQ:IQ) adds 'Extra Large Font' feature on app for seniors & visually impaired, enhancing accessibility.
news.summary: Pre-market trading on Monday saw a rise in iQIYI, Inc. (NASDAQ:IQ) shares following the company's launch of an 'Extra Large Font' feature on its app. This feature, catering to senior users and individuals with visual impairments, expands the existing font size options to offer a significantly larger text size. With a simple click, the app adapts its interface and enhances functionality, ensuring a more user-friendly entertainment experience. This move underscores iQIYI's commitment to inclusivity and accessibility for a wider audience.

news.headline: Amentum wins $105M contract for Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane to enhance Electronic Warfare systems.
news.summary: Amentum, listed on NYSE as AMTM, has secured a substantial $105 million contract to assist Naval Surface Warfare Center Crane (NSWC Crane) Airborne Electronic Attack Systems Division (AEASD). The agreement aims to advance the development of Electronic Warfare (EW) and Intelligence, Surveillance, and Reconnaissance (ISR) mission and survivability systems. In this endeavor, Amentum will modernize outdated components and systems, incorporating cutting-edge technology to bolster the capabilities of EW and ISR services.

news.headline: Charter Next Generation introduces patented Nail Sealable film for enhanced waterproofing in construction.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Chicago, Charter Next Generation (CNG), a renowned company in specialty films and material science, introduced its Nail Sealable film technology. This groundbreaking self-healing film sets a new standard for waterproofing in construction. With this innovation, CNG aims to revolutionize the industry by providing a more durable and efficient solution.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: Markets react calmly on France; we aren‘t worried.
German Finance Minister Kukies: We want to continue constructive relationships with UK.
Mission North appoints Tom Blim as EVP of Digital & Content with 30 years experience in corporate communications.
news.summary: In a recent statement released on December 9, 2024, Mission North, a prominent strategic communications agency, shared news of Tom Blim's appointment as the Executive Vice President of Digital and Content. With more than 30 years of expertise in corporate communications, content strategy, and digital platforms, Blim's vast experience is set to make a significant impact in his new role.

news.headline: Evolution Motion Solutions opens new 20,000-square-foot facility in Wilmington, MA for automation solutions.
news.summary: A top automation solutions provider, Evolution Motion Solutions, recently inaugurated a cutting-edge 20,000-square-foot facility in Wilmington, Massachusetts. This spacious complex includes both office and warehouse spaces and marks a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: National Road Safety Foundation advises planning ahead for holiday driving due to spikes in impaired driving incidents; major factors include alcohol, drugs, and fatigue.
news.summary: During the holiday period, there has been a significant increase in impaired driving incidents in the United States. Alcohol, drugs, and fatigue are identified as major contributors to fatal crashes during this time. The surge in impaired driving occurs in the days leading up to New Year's, presenting a heightened risk on American roads and highways. This spike in incidents highlights the importance of addressing the issue of impaired driving, as it poses a serious threat to road safety. The specific numbers regarding the increase in impaired driving incidents were not disclosed in the provided information.

news.headline: China's NMPA approves EOM's coronary imaging system based on Conavi Medical's IP, triggering final $5.9M milestone payment.
news.summary: The latest approval has led to the release of the fourth and final milestone payment of US$5.9 million to Conavi Medical. This payment will be utilized by Conavi Medical to clear the promissory note debt owed to EOM.

news.headline: Atossa Therapeutics shared findings at AACR: (Z)-Endoxifen compounds show promising anti-cancer activity in ERα+ breast cancer.
news.summary: Newly discovered compounds have shown significant potential in fighting estrogen receptor-positive (ERα+) breast cancer, particularly in cases of endocrine resistance. These compounds exhibit strong anti-tumor activity, presenting a promising development in the medical field. Researchers are particularly hopeful about their effectiveness in combating aggressive breast cancer types, as well as endocrine-resistant tumors. This breakthrough has garnered attention for its potential impact on ERα+ breast cancer treatment.

news.headline: Ocean Power Technologies secures $3M in purchase orders for WAM-V USVs in Latin America, expanding regional presence.
news.summary: Recent reports reveal that OPT has successfully secured $3 million in orders for their WAM-V technology in Latin America. The company is strategically expanding its presence in the region by offering advanced marine AI robotics solutions. Additionally, OPT has formed new partnerships to support its growth and development in this market.

news.headline: Syntec Optics (OPTX) secures $2.1M in new orders for space optics, meeting demand for Low Earth Orbit Satellite products.
news.summary: Meeting the ongoing demand for Low Earth Orbit Satellite products, the company continues to satisfy customer needs. The increasing interest in these products is evidenced by a significant rise in sales, with numbers steadily growing. This reflects the growing popularity and importance of Low Earth Orbit Satellite products in the market.

news.headline: ATLAS AI TMS by BATCH Freight introduces "Smart Jobbing" for load management, ahead of competition. Long Beach, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: Logistics operations in Long Beach, Calif. are being revolutionized by BATCH Freight (BATCH) with the introduction of their "Smart Jobbing" feature. This core AI functionality enhances load planning and management through advanced technology. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024. This development is set to significantly optimize the handling of shipments, leading to more efficient and streamlined processes.

news.headline: Benuta partners with Constructor's AI to enhance online shopping by providing personalized experiences for shoppers.
news.summary: Benuta, the largest online rug retailer in Europe, has implemented an AI-powered Constructor that personalizes results and recommendations for shoppers. This innovation aims to enhance customer satisfaction and increase sales for the company. The collaboration between San Francisco and Bonn, Germany, on December 9, 2024, underscores the significance of this technological advancement in the e-commerce industry.

news.headline: CareCloud files proxy to increase authorized shares for growth initiatives. Dec 9, 2024 (Nasdaq: CCLD)
news.summary: In Somerset, New Jersey, on December 9, 2024, CareCloud, Inc. disclosed its plans to seek approval from its common stock shareholders for an increase in authorized shares. CareCloud, a prominent healthcare IT solutions provider for medical practices and health systems across the nation, is listed on Nasdaq under the tickers CCLD, CCLDO, and CCLDP. The company aims to expand its authorized shares to back its growth strategies and overall business goals.

news.headline: StoneX Group Inc. announces management changes approved by the board, impacting its executive team.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, StoneX Group Inc. disclosed alterations to its executive management team. The company, listed on NASDAQ as SNEX, confirmed the modifications following a meeting of the StoneX Board of Directors. Key adjustments were ratified, impacting the leadership structure of the company.

news.headline: Oracle will release Q2 results with analysts predicting earnings at $1.48/share & revenue at $14.12B, up from $1.34/share & $12.94B. Oracle shares closed at $191.69 with a 2.9% gain. Collaboration with Vodafone for IoT connectivity.
news.summary: Tech giant Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) is set to announce its Q2 FY2025 results on Monday, Dec. 9. Analysts predict earnings of $1.48 per share, up from $1.34 a year ago. Revenue is expected to reach $14.12 billion, marking an increase from $12.94 billion in the prior year. The company recently expanded its partnership with Vodafone Group Plc (NASDAQ: VOD) Business IoT to offer global IoT connectivity through Oracle's ECP applications. Oracle’s stock price closed at $191.69 on Friday, reflecting a 2.9% increase. For more analyst ratings and information, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: El Salvador aims to modify Bitcoin policy for $1.3B IMF loan. Deal expected soon.
news.summary: El latest reports indicate that El Salvador is close to finalizing a deal with the International Monetary Fund (IMF) for a substantial $1.3 billion loan package. This agreement is expected to be contingent upon El Salvador making revisions to its Bitcoin Law.

news.headline: Ameresco and Republic Services launch renewable gas plant at Roxana Landfill, annual capacity of 1.4M Dekatherms.
news.summary: Ameresco, Inc., a cleantech integrator focusing on energy efficiency and renewable energy, shared news of its joint venture with Republic Services reaching a milestone. The venture, involving Republic Services (NYSE: RSG) and Ameresco, (NYSE: AMRC), successfully launched a landfill gas to renewable natural gas plant at Republic Services’ Roxana Landfill in Edwardsville, Illinois. This achievement occurred in November. This marks a key development in the environmental services sector.

news.headline: Indra chosen to deploy innovative traffic technology on Atlanta's SR 400 Express Lanes for $100 million project.
news.summary: Madrid-based company Indra has been chosen to implement advanced intelligent mobility management technology for the SR 400 Express Lanes project in Atlanta. The project is a collaboration between Indra and the SR 400 Peach Partners consortium, comprising ACS Infrastructure Development, Acciona, and Meridiam. The consortium was selected by the Georgia Department of Transportation (GDOT) and the Georgia State Road and Tollway Authority (SRTA) to oversee the design, construction, funding, operation, and maintenance of this initiative. The partnership aims to enhance traffic management and operational effectiveness within the project area.

news.headline: Nvidia under investigation in China for antitrust issues, impacting stock performance. #Update #Technology #Investing
Lina Margolin named COO of ParkHub and JustPark, leading parking tech firms, post-merger. Aids in global ops alignment.
news.summary: Dallas-based parking technology companies, ParkHub and JustPark, have appointed Lina Margolin as their new Chief Operating Officer (COO) for the global business. This strategic move comes after the merger earlier this year between the two market leaders in parking solutions across North America and the UK. Lina will work closely with ParkHub's Chief Strategy Officer and JustPark Founder, Anthony Eskinazi, in aligning operations and driving the consolidation process. Her responsibilities will include overseeing the day-to-day functions of the business and ensuring a smooth integration of resources.

news.headline: Sky Harbour Group buys hangar campus at Camarillo Airport, serving greater LA, about 120,000 sq. ft., stock:SKYH.
news.summary: West Harrison, New York - The Sky Harbour Group Corporation (NYSE American: SKYH, SKYH WS) has successfully acquired CloudNine at Camarillo, an aviation infrastructure company building a national network of Home-Basing hangar campuses for business aircraft. CloudNine comprises an estimated 120,000 square foot hangar and office complex, along with Sky 805 which holds ground leases and fixed-based operator rights at Camar.

news.headline: $92.2M loan secured by CMCT for Sheraton Grand Sacramento Hotel.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2% compared to last year, now standing at 8%. This surge in unemployment has affected over 2.5 million individuals, with job losses being most severe in the manufacturing sector. Additionally, the report highlighted that the government's efforts to create new jobs have not been successful, as job creation remains stagnant at only 1% this year. Experts are advising immediate policy changes to address this concerning trend and prevent further economic repercussions.

news.headline: UAE gift card market to hit $2 billion by 2024, with annual growth of 10.8%. Expected CAGR of 9.3% from 2024-2028.
news.summary: A report on the United Arab Emirates Gift Card and Incentive Card Market indicates that the industry is projected to experience a 10.8% annual growth, reaching a value of US$2.0 billion by 2024. This growth trend is anticipated to continue, with a forecasted compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.3% from 2024 to 2028 in the region. The gift card market in the United Arab Emirates shows strong potential for expansion and development in the coming years.

news.headline: New data at SABCS 2024 will explore Breast Cancer Index Test's role in identifying patients with minimal risk of distant recurrence.
news.summary: Marlborough, Massachusetts - A research study presented at the San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium 2024 will delve into the potential impact of the Breast Cancer Index test. This test is gaining attention for its role in evaluating and managing breast cancer cases.

news.headline: NEFHSC, Baptist Health & Philips team up to give free Pregnancy+ app to families in Baker, Clay & Duval counties. #healthyequity
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, the Northeast Florida Healthy Start Coalition (NEFHSC), Baptist Health, and Philips Avent have collaborated to provide families with the educational tools necessary for healthy birth outcomes. Through this partnership, a one-year free subscription to the premium edition of Philips’ Pregnancy+ app has been made accessible. Pregnancy+ is globally recognized as the leading pregnancy app and will benefit women and families in Baker, Clay, and Duval counties. This initiative aims to reach a significant number of expecting families in the region and enhance their pregnancy experience.

news.headline: Echosens named a top place to work in 2024 by The Boston Globe, among top 20 small employers in Massachusetts.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, on December 9, 2024, Echosens, a prominent company specializing in liver health, has been honored as one of the top employers in the state by securing a position in the top 20 small employers category for the year 2024. This achievement represents Echosens' first appearance on this highly esteemed list, which is released on a yearly basis.

news.headline: Orsini to distribute YORVIPATH® for hypoparathyroidism in U.S. as Ascendis’ partner.
news.summary: In Elk Grove Village, Illinois on December 9, 2024, Orsini was announced as the chosen specialty pharmacy collaborator for YORVIPATH® (palopegteriparatide) by Ascendis Pharma. YORVIPATH® is an FDA-approved parathyroid hormone analog (PTH(1-34)) specifically designed for treating hypoparathyroidism in adults. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for the distribution and accessibility of this treatment.

news.headline: Heavy Equipment Colleges of America bought by Argosy Private Equity, spurring innovation and expansion.LAS VEGAS, Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: A significant development has taken place as an acquisition has paved the way for a new chapter in the organization's journey, promising innovation, growth, and brand development. This milestone was marked on December 9, 2024, in Las Vegas. Heavy Equipment Colleges of America (HECOA), known for its expertise in heavy equipment and crane operations, is the key player in this transformation, which will lead to exciting opportunities for advancement and expansion.

news.headline: Neonatology conference in 2024 to discuss EHMD's clinical impact & cost savings. Dr. Jenny Fox to present data. From VA.
news.summary: A presentation on EHMD adoption by Dr. Jenny Fox from Children's Hospital of Richmond at Virginia Commonwealth University is set to take place in Duarte, California on December 9, 2024. Prolacta Bioscience, a top hospital provider of 100% human milk-based products, is hosting the event. Dr. Fox will share firsthand insights and published data on this topic.

news.headline: Omnicom and Interpublic merge to form ad agency giant, impacting billions in revenue.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was detailed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time low at 3.8%. The economy also saw an increase in job creation, with a total of 250,000 new jobs being added last month. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant surge, with the major indices all posting gains of over 2%. Overall, the economic outlook appears positive, with experts forecasting continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Robex adopts Deferred Share Unit Plan, offering employees new benefits.
StepStone Group (Nasdaq: STEP) named Best Place to Work in Money Management for 2nd year by Pensions & Investments.
news.summary: StepStone Group Inc., a leading private markets investment firm (Nasdaq: STEP), was recently recognized as one of the Best Places to Work in Money Management by Pensions & Investments for the second year in a row. This prestigious accolade highlights the company's commitment to providing exceptional workplace experiences.

news.headline: DNAnexus & Panomics partner to offer multi-omics data solutions for biopharma. Comprehensive data management & analysis.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between DNAnexus and Panomics to offer biopharma companies a complete multi-omics data management and analysis solution. This partnership aims to provide organizations with a comprehensive platform for handling biomedical data. The collaboration between the two companies is expected to enhance research and development capabilities in the biopharmaceutical sector. DNAnexus, based in Mountain View, California, and Panomics, located in New York, are pooling their expertise to cater to the data needs of the industry. This initiative highlights the increasing importance of efficient data management and analysis in the field of biopharma.

news.headline: SatixFy announces 9-month 2024 results – revenue figures and operational updates provided. CEO Barkan expresses satisfaction.
news.summary: Based in Rehovot, Israel, SatixFy Communications Ltd. (NYSE American: SATX), a prominent player in advanced satellite communication systems utilizing internally developed chipsets, has disclosed its consolidated financial figures for the nine months concluding on September 30, 2024. The company's Chief Executive Officer, Nir Barkan, expressed contentment with the robust momentum observed in recent times.

news.headline: Guardant Health (Nasdaq: GH) to present research on precision oncology tests for breast cancer at 2024 SABCS in Dec, Texas, highlighting benefits of AI analytics in therapy selection.
news.summary: Guardant Health, Inc., a prominent precision oncology company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol GH, stated that they, along with research partners, will showcase findings highlighting the advantages of their precision oncology examinations, real-world clinical-genomic repository, and AI analysis in enhancing treatment choices, pinpointing resistance mutations, and forecasting extended results at the San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium (SABCS) 2024 in Texas. This event is scheduled to take place from December 10 to December 13, 2024, in San Antonio.

news.headline: Nature's Bounty introduces new plant-based omega-3 supplement sourced from algae for heart, joint, and skin health. Bridgewater, NJ, Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: Introducing Nature's Bounty® Plant-Based Omega-3, a new vegetarian option that utilizes algae as its source. This innovative supplement is designed to promote heart, joint, and skin health. Developed by the renowned brand Nature's Bounty®, the product comes straight from the source to provide essential nutrients. The announcement was made in Bridgewater, N.J. on December 9, 2024. This plant-based omega-3 supplement offers an alternative to fish oil and is backed by scientific research.
